diagrams.title: Comparator Chaining Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how thenComparing() works when primary comparator returns 0
diagrams.purpose: Visualize multi-level sorting: only when primary keys are equal does secondary comparator activate

diagrams.title: nullsFirst vs nullsLast Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows how null elements are positioned in sorted collection
diagrams.purpose: Understand null handling in comparators and when to use each method

diagrams.title: Comparator Interface Methods Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows Java 8+ Comparator static and default methods
elements: Static: comparing(), comparingInt(), naturalOrder(), reverseOrder(), nullsFirst(), nullsLast()
Functional method: compare(T o1, T o2)
diagrams.purpose: Overview of all available Comparator methods for creating complex sorting logic
